'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 60''' is the sixtieth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[April 18]], [[1979]].

This issue includes "[[Pursuit!]]", the black & white fourth and final part of "[[The Kingdom of Ice]]". First published in color in ''[[Pizzazz]]'' magazine, "The Kingdom of Ice" was incomplete until its final part was printed here. It wasn't colored until its reprint in the first ''[[Marvel Illustrated Books]]'' volume from where [[Dark Horse Comics]] took it for its ''[[Star Wars Omnibus]]'' series.

==Contents==
*"[[Pursuit!]]"
*"The power of Warlock Part 7: Zero"
*"Micronauts Part 5: A hunting we will go!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: The unreal!"
